name: pulumi-registry-get-type
description: Get the JSON schema for a specific JSON schema type reference

provider.description: The cloud provider (e.g., 'aws', 'azure', 'gcp', 'random') or github.com/org/repo for Git-hosted components

module.description: The module to query (e.g., 's3', 'ec2', 'lambda'). Optional for smaller providers, will be 'index by default.

name.description: The name of the type to query (e.g., 'BucketGrant', 'FunctionEnvironment', 'InstanceCpuOptions')

version.description: The provider version to use (e.g., '6.0.0'). If not specified, uses the latest available version.
